mapper.sql: id, wishlist_id, user_id, sale_model, build_config_code, wishlist_name, status, sale_model_code, model_code, variant_code, configuration_code, option_codes, option_codes_hash, invalid_reason, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_wishlist ( id, wishlist_id, user_id, sale_model, build_config_code, wishlist_name, status, sale_model_code, model_code, variant_code, configuration_code, option_codes, option_codes_hash, invalid_reason, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{wishlistId}, #{userId}, #{saleModel}, #{buildConfigCode}, #{wishlistName}, #{status}, #{saleModelCode}, #{modelCode}, #{variantCode}, #{configurationCode}, #{optionCodes}, #{optionCodesHash}, #{invalidReason}, #{description}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_wishlist t SET
t.sale_model = #{saleModel},
t.build_config_code = #{buildConfigCode},
t.wishlist_name = #{wishlistName},
t.status = #{status},
t.sale_model_code = #{saleModelCode},
t.model_code = #{modelCode},
t.variant_code = #{variantCode},
t.configuration_code = #{configurationCode},
t.option_codes = #{optionCodes},
t.option_codes_hash = #{optionCodesHash},
t.invalid_reason = #{invalidReason},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_wishlist t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_wishlist t WHERE t.wishlist_id = #{wishlistId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_wishlist t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.row_valid = 1 ORDER BY t.modify_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_wishlist t WHERE t.user_id = #{userId} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_wishlist t WHERE t.sale_model_code = #{saleModelCode} AND t.row_valid = 1
